test_cases.name: edge_case_boundary_parameters
test_cases.scenario: Generate edge-case tests for numeric, string, and array parameters at boundary values (min, max, empty, special characters, unicode)

input.openapi_spec: {"openapi": "3.0.0", "info": {"title": "Search API", "version": "1.0.0"}, "servers": [{"url": "https://api.example.com"}], "paths": {"/search": {"get": {"operationId": "search", "parameters": [{"name": "q", "in": "query", "required": true, "schema": {"type": "string", "minLength": 1, "maxLength": 255}}, {"name": "limit", "in": "query", "schema": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 1, "maximum": 100, "default": 10}}, {"name": "tags", "in": "query", "schema": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}, "maxItems": 5}}], "responses": {"200": {"description": "Search results", "content": {"application/json": {"schema": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "object"}}}}}}}}}}}

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill generates edge-case tests including: q parameter with empty string (should fail), max length (255 chars), special characters (!@#$%), unicode (你好), emoji (😀); limit parameter with 1, 100, 0, -1; tags array with empty, single element, 5 elements; all tests verify correct error handling or success
phase_coverage: Phase 2: Extract Endpoint Metadata and Detect Dependencies
Phase 4: Generate Edge-Case and Boundary Test Scenarios
Phase 7: Compile Test Suite and Generate Code

test_cases.name: error_handling_http_status_codes
test_cases.scenario: Generate error-path tests that trigger 400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 429 responses with specific invalid inputs

input.openapi_spec: {"openapi": "3.0.0", "info": {"title": "Auth API", "version": "1.0.0"}, "servers": [{"url": "https://api.example.com"}], "paths": {"/auth/login": {"post": {"operationId": "login", "requestBody": {"required": true, "content": {"application/json": {"schema": {"type": "object", "required": ["username", "password"], "properties": {"username": {"type": "string"}, "password": {"type": "string"}}}}}}, "responses": {"200": {"description": "Login successful", "content": {"application/json": {"schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"token": {"type": "string"}}}}}}, "400": {"description": "Invalid credentials"}, "401": {"description": "Unauthorized"}, "429": {"description": "Too many requests"}}}}, "/users/{id}": {"get": {"operationId": "getUser", "parameters": [{"name": "id", "in": "path", "required": true, "schema": {"type": "integer"}}], "responses": {"200": {"description": "User found"}, "404": {"description": "User not found"}}}}}}

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill generates error tests: POST /auth/login with missing password (expect 400), invalid username/password (expect 401), N+1 requests to trigger rate limit (expect 429); GET /users/{id} with id=999999 (expect 404); all tests verify correct error status codes and error messages
phase_coverage: Phase 2: Extract Endpoint Metadata and Detect Dependencies
Phase 5: Generate Error-Path and Security Test Scenarios
Phase 7: Compile Test Suite and Generate Code

test_cases.name: security_testing_injection_attacks
test_cases.scenario: Generate security tests for SQL injection, XSS, and CSRF vulnerabilities with standard OWASP payloads

input.openapi_spec: {"openapi": "3.0.0", "info": {"title": "Vulnerable API", "version": "1.0.0"}, "servers": [{"url": "https://api.example.com"}], "paths": {"/search": {"get": {"operationId": "search", "parameters": [{"name": "query", "in": "query", "required": true, "schema": {"type": "string"}}], "responses": {"200": {"description": "Results"}, "400": {"description": "Invalid input"}}}}, "/comments": {"post": {"operationId": "createComment", "requestBody": {"required": true, "content": {"application/json": {"schema": {"type": "object", "required": ["text"], "properties": {"text": {"type": "string"}}}}}}, "responses": {"201": {"description": "Comment created"}, "400": {"description": "Invalid input"}}}}}}}

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill generates security tests: GET /search with SQL injection payloads ("' OR '1'='1", "admin'--") expecting 400 or sanitized response; POST /comments with XSS payloads ("<script>alert('xss')</script>") expecting 400 or escaped output; all tests verify API does not execute injected code
phase_coverage: Phase 2: Extract Endpoint Metadata and Detect Dependencies
Phase 5: Generate Error-Path and Security Test Scenarios
Phase 7: Compile Test Suite and Generate Code

test_cases.name: quality_gate_dependency_ordering
test_cases.scenario: Verify that happy-path tests are correctly ordered by data dependencies (POST before GET, create before read)

input.openapi_spec: {"openapi": "3.0.0", "info": {"title": "CRUD API", "version": "1.0.0"}, "servers": [{"url": "https://api.example.com"}], "paths": {"/items": {"post": {"operationId": "createItem", "requestBody": {"required": true, "content": {"application/json": {"schema": {"type": "object", "required": ["name"], "properties": {"name": {"type": "string"}}}}}}, "responses": {"201": {"description": "Item created", "content": {"application/json": {"schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"id": {"type": "integer"}, "name": {"type": "string"}}}}}}}}, "get": {"operationId": "listItems", "responses": {"200": {"description": "Items"}}}}, "/items/{id}": {"get": {"operationId": "getItem", "parameters": [{"name": "id", "in": "path", "required": true, "schema": {"type": "integer"}}], "responses": {"200": {"description": "Item details"}}}, "patch": {"operationId": "updateItem", "parameters": [{"name": "id", "in": "path", "required": true, "schema": {"type": "integer"}}], "requestBody": {"required": true, "content": {"application/json": {"schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"name": {"type": "string"}}}}}}, "responses": {"200": {"description": "Item updated"}}}, "delete": {"operationId": "deleteItem", "parameters": [{"name": "id", "in": "path", "required": true, "schema": {"type": "integer"}}], "responses": {"204": {"description": "Item deleted"}}}}}}}

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects that POST /items returns id, which is required by GET /items/{id}, PATCH /items/{id}, DELETE /items/{id}; generates tests in order: POST (create), GET (read), PATCH (update), DELETE (delete); extracts id from POST response and injects into subsequent tests; verifies dependency graph is acyclic and complete
phase_coverage: Phase 2: Extract Endpoint Metadata and Detect Dependencies
Phase 3: Generate Happy-Path Test Scenarios
Phase 7: Compile Test Suite and Generate Code

test_cases.name: error_handling_invalid_openapi_spec

test_cases.name: load_testing_performance_assertions
test_cases.scenario: Generate load tests with performance assertions (p50, p95, p99 response times, error rate < 1%) based on performance SLA

input.openapi_spec: {"openapi": "3.0.0", "info": {"title": "Fast API", "version": "1.0.0"}, "servers": [{"url": "https://api.example.com"}], "paths": {"/data": {"get": {"operationId": "getData", "responses": {"200": {"description": "Data"}}}}}}}

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill generates load tests: concurrent (10, 50, 100 simultaneous requests), sustained (10 requests/second for 1-5 minutes); defines performance assertions: p50 < 2000ms, p95 < 3000ms, p99 < 4000ms, error rate < 1%; includes cleanup steps to reset state after load tests

test_cases.name: coverage_report_endpoint_parameter_error_security
test_cases.scenario: Generate comprehensive coverage report showing endpoint %, parameter %, error code %, and security test coverage with gaps and recommendations

input.openapi_spec: {"openapi": "3.0.0", "info": {"title": "Complete API", "version": "1.0.0"}, "servers": [{"url": "https://api.example.com"}], "paths": {"/users": {"post": {"operationId": "createUser", "requestBody": {"required": true, "content": {"application/json": {"schema": {"type": "object", "required": ["name", "email"], "properties": {"name": {"type": "string"}, "email": {"type": "string"}}}}}}, "responses": {"201": {"description": "Created"}, "400": {"description": "Bad request"}, "409": {"description": "Conflict"}}}}, "get": {"operationId": "listUsers", "parameters": [{"name": "limit", "in": "query", "schema": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 1, "maximum": 100}}], "responses": {"200": {"description": "Success"}, "429": {"description": "Rate limited"}}}}, "/users/{id}": {"get": {"operationId": "getUser", "parameters": [{"name": "id", "in": "path", "required": true, "schema": {"type": "integer"}}], "responses": {"200": {"description": "Success"}, "404": {"description": "Not found"}}}}}}}

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill generates coverage report: 100% endpoint coverage (3/3 endpoints), 100% parameter coverage (3/3 parameters), 100% error code coverage (5/5 codes: 201, 400, 409, 200, 429, 404), 71% security coverage (5/7 vulnerability types); identifies gaps (CSRF, insecure deserialization not tested); provides specific recommendations ("Add CSRF token validation tests", "Test for sensitive data exposure in responses")

Phase 2: Extract Endpoint Metadata and Detect Dependencies
Phase 3: Generate Happy-Path Test Scenarios
Phase 4: Generate Edge-Case and Boundary Test Scenarios
Phase 5: Generate Error-Path and Security Test Scenarios

Phase 7: Compile Test Suite and Generate Code

testable_surfaces.boundary: Valid JSON with all required fields
Valid JSON with host and basePath
All endpoints with path, method, parameters, responses
POST response id used in GET path parameter
POST before GET, create before read
Empty, max length, special characters, unicode
Specific invalid inputs for each error
p50, p95, p99 based on SLA

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates the core happy-path functionality: parsing a valid OpenAPI 3.0 spec with multiple endpoints and generating a complete test suite
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 1 (parsing), Phase 2 (metadata extraction), Phase 3 (happy-path generation), Phase 7 (code generation), Phase 8 (documentation)
test_rationale.failure_caught: If parsing fails, metadata extraction fails, happy-path tests are missing, code is not generated, or documentation is incomplete

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates backward compatibility with Swagger 2.0 specifications, which use different structure (host, basePath, schemes instead of servers)
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 1 (Swagger 2.0 parsing), Phase 2 (metadata extraction with query parameters), Phase 3 (happy-path generation), Phase 7 (jest code generation)
test_rationale.failure_caught: If Swagger 2.0 parsing fails, query parameters are not extracted, or jest code generation is broken

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates edge-case test generation for numeric, string, and array parameters at boundary values, which is critical for robustness
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 4 (edge-case generation), boundary value detection, custom edge case inclusion, parameter constraint handling
test_rationale.failure_caught: If edge cases are not generated, boundary values are missing, special characters/unicode are not tested, or custom edge cases are ignored

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates error-path test generation for all documented HTTP error codes (400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 429), which is essential for reliability
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 5 (error-path generation), error code triggering, authentication testing, rate limiting testing
test_rationale.failure_caught: If error tests are not generated, specific error codes are not triggered, or error messages are not validated

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates security test generation for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities (SQL injection, XSS), which is critical for API security
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 5 (security test generation), SQL injection payload injection, XSS payload injection, safe behavior validation
test_rationale.failure_caught: If security tests are not generated, standard payloads are not used, or safe behavior is not verified

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates that happy-path tests are correctly ordered by data dependencies (POST before GET), which is critical for integration testing
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 2 (dependency detection), Phase 3 (dependency-ordered test sequencing), output injection from POST to GET
test_rationale.failure_caught: If dependencies are not detected, tests are not ordered correctly, or outputs are not injected into subsequent tests

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates error handling for invalid OpenAPI specifications, which is critical for user experience and preventing silent failures
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 1 (error handling), JSON syntax error detection, validation error reporting, abort response
test_rationale.failure_caught: If invalid specs are not detected, error messages are not specific, or execution does not abort

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates edge-case test generation for optional parameter combinations, which is critical for API flexibility
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 4 (optional parameter combination generation), parameter subset testing, combination limiting
test_rationale.failure_caught: If optional parameter combinations are not generated, too many combinations are generated (explosion), or missing parameters are not handled

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates load test generation with performance assertions based on SLA, which is critical for performance validation
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 6 (load test generation), concurrent request testing, sustained load testing, performance assertion calculation (p50, p95, p99)
test_rationale.failure_caught: If load tests are not generated, performance assertions are not calculated, or thresholds are not based on SLA

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates comprehensive coverage reporting with endpoint %, parameter %, error code %, and security coverage, which is critical for test completeness
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 8 (documentation and coverage report generation), coverage calculation, gap analysis, actionable recommendations
test_rationale.failure_caught: If coverage report is not generated, coverage percentages are inaccurate, gaps are not identified, or recommendations are not actionable

input.openapi_spec: {"openapi": "3.0.0", "info": {"title": "CRUD API", "version": "1.0.0"}, "servers": [{"url": "https://api.example.com"}], "paths": {"/items": {"post": {"operationId": "createItem", "requestBody": {"required": true, "content": {"application/json": {"schema": {"type": "object", "required": ["name"], "properties": {"name": {"type": "string"}}}}}}, "responses": {"201": {"description": "Item created", "content": {"application/json": {"schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"id": {"type": "integer"}, "name": {"type": "string"}}}}}}}}, "get": {"operationId": "listItems", "responses": {"200": {"description": "Items"}}}}, "/items/{id}": {"get": {"operationId": "getItem", "parameters": [{"name": "id", "in": "path", "required": true, "schema": {"type": "integer"}}], "responses": {"200": {"description": "Item details"}}}, "patch": {"operationId": "updateItem", "parameters": [{"name": "id", "in": "path", "required": true, "schema": {"type": "integer"}}], "requestBody": {"required": true, "content": {"application/json": {"schema": {"type": "object", "properties": {"name": {"type": "string"}}}}}}, "responses": {"200": {"description": "Item updated"}}}, "delete": {"operationId": "deleteItem", "parameters": [{"name": "id", "in": "path", "required": true, "schema": {"type": "integer"}}], "responses": {"204": {"description": "Item deleted"}}}}}}}

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects that POST /items returns id, which is required by GET /items/{id}, PATCH /items/{id}, DELETE /items/{id}; generates tests in order: POST (create), GET (read), PATCH (update), DELETE (delete); extracts id from POST response and injects into subsequent tests; verifies dependency graph is acyclic and complete
phase_coverage: Phase 2: Extract Endpoint Metadata and Detect Dependencies
Phase 3: Generate Happy-Path Test Scenarios
Phase 7: Compile Test Suite and Generate Code

test_cases.name: error_handling_invalid_openapi_spec
test_cases.scenario: Handle invalid OpenAPI specification with syntax errors, missing required fields, and malformed JSON

input.openapi_spec: {"openapi": "3.0.0", "info": {"title": "Broken API"}, "paths": {"invalid_json_here

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects JSON syntax error (unclosed brace), aborts execution, returns specific error message with line number and field name, asks user to provide corrected specification
phase_coverage: Phase 1: Parse and Validate Specification

test_cases.name: edge_case_optional_parameters
test_cases.scenario: Generate tests for endpoints with optional parameters in various combinations (all present, all absent, subsets)

input.openapi_spec: {"openapi": "3.0.0", "info": {"title": "Filter API", "version": "1.0.0"}, "servers": [{"url": "https://api.example.com"}], "paths": {"/items": {"get": {"operationId": "filterItems", "parameters": [{"name": "category", "in": "query", "schema": {"type": "string"}}, {"name": "minPrice", "in": "query", "schema": {"type": "number"}}, {"name": "maxPrice", "in": "query", "schema": {"type": "number"}}, {"name": "inStock", "in": "query", "schema": {"type": "boolean"}}], "responses": {"200": {"description": "Filtered items"}}}}}}}

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill generates edge-case tests for optional parameter combinations: all 4 present, all absent, subsets of 1-3 parameters; each test verifies API returns 200 and handles missing parameters gracefully; limits to 3-5 combinations to avoid explosion
phase_coverage: Phase 2: Extract Endpoint Metadata and Detect Dependencies
Phase 4: Generate Edge-Case and Boundary Test Scenarios
Phase 7: Compile Test Suite and Generate Code

test_cases.name: load_testing_performance_assertions
test_cases.scenario: Generate load tests with performance assertions (p50, p95, p99 response times, error rate < 1%) based on performance SLA

input.openapi_spec: {"openapi": "3.0.0", "info": {"title": "Fast API", "version": "1.0.0"}, "servers": [{"url": "https://api.example.com"}], "paths": {"/data": {"get": {"operationId": "getData", "responses": {"200": {"description": "Data"}}}}}}}

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill generates load tests: concurrent (10, 50, 100 simultaneous requests), sustained (10 requests/second for 1-5 minutes); defines performance assertions: p50 < 2000ms, p95 < 3000ms, p99 < 4000ms, error rate < 1%; includes cleanup steps to reset state after load tests
phase_coverage: Phase 2: Extract Endpoint Metadata and Detect Dependencies
Phase 6: Generate Load and Performance Test Scenarios
Phase 7: Compile Test Suite and Generate Code

test_cases.name: coverage_report_endpoint_parameter_error_security
test_cases.scenario: Generate comprehensive coverage report showing endpoint %, parameter %, error code %, and security test coverage with gaps and recommendations

input.openapi_spec: {"openapi": "3.0.0", "info": {"title": "Complete API", "version": "1.0.0"}, "servers": [{"url": "https://api.example.com"}], "paths": {"/users": {"post": {"operationId": "createUser", "requestBody": {"required": true, "content": {"application/json": {"schema": {"type": "object", "required": ["name", "email"], "properties": {"name": {"type": "string"}, "email": {"type": "string"}}}}}}, "responses": {"201": {"description": "Created"}, "400": {"description": "Bad request"}, "409": {"description": "Conflict"}}}}, "get": {"operationId": "listUsers", "parameters": [{"name": "limit", "in": "query", "schema": {"type": "integer", "minimum": 1, "maximum": 100}}], "responses": {"200": {"description": "Success"}, "429": {"description": "Rate limited"}}}}, "/users/{id}": {"get": {"operationId": "getUser", "parameters": [{"name": "id", "in": "path", "required": true, "schema": {"type": "integer"}}], "responses": {"200": {"description": "Success"}, "404": {"description": "Not found"}}}}}}}

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill generates coverage report: 100% endpoint coverage (3/3 endpoints), 100% parameter coverage (3/3 parameters), 100% error code coverage (5/5 codes: 201, 400, 409, 200, 429, 404), 71% security coverage (5/7 vulnerability types); identifies gaps (CSRF, insecure deserialization not tested); provides specific recommendations ("Add CSRF token validation tests", "Test for sensitive data exposure in responses")
phase_coverage: Phase 1: Parse and Validate Specification
Phase 2: Extract Endpoint Metadata and Detect Dependencies
Phase 3: Generate Happy-Path Test Scenarios
Phase 4: Generate Edge-Case and Boundary Test Scenarios
Phase 5: Generate Error-Path and Security Test Scenarios
Phase 6: Generate Load and Performance Test Scenarios
Phase 7: Compile Test Suite and Generate Code
Phase 8: Generate Documentation and Coverage Report

testable_surfaces.boundary: Valid JSON with all required fields
Valid JSON with host and basePath
All endpoints with path, method, parameters, responses
POST response id used in GET path parameter
POST before GET, create before read
Empty, max length, special characters, unicode
Specific invalid inputs for each error
p50, p95, p99 based on SLA

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates the core happy-path functionality: parsing a valid OpenAPI 3.0 spec with multiple endpoints and generating a complete test suite
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 1 (parsing), Phase 2 (metadata extraction), Phase 3 (happy-path generation), Phase 7 (code generation), Phase 8 (documentation)
test_rationale.failure_caught: If parsing fails, metadata extraction fails, happy-path tests are missing, code is not generated, or documentation is incomplete

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates backward compatibility with Swagger 2.0 specifications, which use different structure (host, basePath, schemes instead of servers)
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 1 (Swagger 2.0 parsing), Phase 2 (metadata extraction with query parameters), Phase 3 (happy-path generation), Phase 7 (jest code generation)
test_rationale.failure_caught: If Swagger 2.0 parsing fails, query parameters are not extracted, or jest code generation is broken

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates edge-case test generation for numeric, string, and array parameters at boundary values, which is critical for robustness
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 4 (edge-case generation), boundary value detection, custom edge case inclusion, parameter constraint handling
test_rationale.failure_caught: If edge cases are not generated, boundary values are missing, special characters/unicode are not tested, or custom edge cases are ignored

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates error-path test generation for all documented HTTP error codes (400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 429), which is essential for reliability
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 5 (error-path generation), error code triggering, authentication testing, rate limiting testing
test_rationale.failure_caught: If error tests are not generated, specific error codes are not triggered, or error messages are not validated

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates security test generation for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities (SQL injection, XSS), which is critical for API security
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 5 (security test generation), SQL injection payload injection, XSS payload injection, safe behavior validation
test_rationale.failure_caught: If security tests are not generated, standard payloads are not used, or safe behavior is not verified

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates that happy-path tests are correctly ordered by data dependencies (POST before GET), which is critical for integration testing
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 2 (dependency detection), Phase 3 (dependency-ordered test sequencing), output injection from POST to GET
test_rationale.failure_caught: If dependencies are not detected, tests are not ordered correctly, or outputs are not injected into subsequent tests

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates error handling for invalid OpenAPI specifications, which is critical for user experience and preventing silent failures
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 1 (error handling), JSON syntax error detection, validation error reporting, abort response
test_rationale.failure_caught: If invalid specs are not detected, error messages are not specific, or execution does not abort

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates edge-case test generation for optional parameter combinations, which is critical for API flexibility
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 4 (optional parameter combination generation), parameter subset testing, combination limiting
test_rationale.failure_caught: If optional parameter combinations are not generated, too many combinations are generated (explosion), or missing parameters are not handled

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates load test generation with performance assertions based on SLA, which is critical for performance validation
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 6 (load test generation), concurrent request testing, sustained load testing, performance assertion calculation (p50, p95, p99)
test_rationale.failure_caught: If load tests are not generated, performance assertions are not calculated, or thresholds are not based on SLA

test_rationale.why_it_exists: Validates comprehensive coverage reporting with endpoint %, parameter %, error code %, and security coverage, which is critical for test completeness
test_rationale.what_it_tests: Phase 8 (documentation and coverage report generation), coverage calculation, gap analysis, actionable recommendations
test_rationale.failure_caught: If coverage report is not generated, coverage percentages are inaccurate, gaps are not identified, or recommendations are not actionable

chain_definition.name: api-test-generator-chain
chain_definition.description: Converts an OpenAPI/Swagger specification into a comprehensive integration test suite covering happy paths, edge cases, error scenarios, security vulnerabilities, and load patterns.

entry_inputs.openapi_spec: OpenAPI 3.0 or Swagger 2.0 specification in JSON or YAML format
entry_inputs.test_framework: Target testing framework (pytest, jest, mocha, postman, or generic)
entry_inputs.include_load_tests: Whether to generate load/performance test scenarios
entry_inputs.include_auth_tests: Whether to generate authentication and authorization test cases
entry_inputs.include_security_tests: Whether to generate security vulnerability test cases
entry_inputs.output_format: Output format (code, markdown, json, or postman-collection)
entry_inputs.performance_sla_ms: Expected response time threshold in milliseconds

terminal_outputs.test_code: Executable test code in the specified framework
terminal_outputs.test_suite: Structured test suite with metadata and test cases
terminal_outputs.test_documentation: Human-readable test plan with coverage matrix
terminal_outputs.coverage_report: Endpoint, parameter, error code, and security test coverage

parse_and_validate_openapi_spec.description: Validate OpenAPI specification and extract metadata

extract_endpoint_metadata.description: Extract endpoints, parameters, authentication, and data dependencies

generate_happy_path_tests.description: Generate valid test cases for all endpoints ordered by dependency

generate_edge_case_tests.description: Generate boundary and combination tests for all parameters

generate_error_path_tests.description: Generate tests for all documented error codes and error conditions

generate_security_tests.description: Generate tests for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities (SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, etc.)

generate_load_tests.description: Generate concurrent, high-volume, and sustained load test scenarios

compile_test_suite.description: Organize all test cases into structured suite with dependencies and execution order

generate_executable_test_code.description: Generate syntactically valid, executable test code in specified framework

generate_test_documentation.description: Generate test plan, execution guide, and coverage report

coverage_report.notes: All workflow requirements are covered by the designed chain. The chain follows a logical progression from specification parsing through test generation to code generation and documentation. Parallel execution is optimized at phases 3-4 where independent test generators can run simultaneously.

execution_plan.description: API Test Generator Chain - Execution Plan
execution_plan.parallelization_strategy: 5 execution layers with 4 parallel branches in layer 3

execution_layers.description: Extract endpoint metadata and detect data dependencies
Generate test scenarios in parallel (happy path, edge cases, error/security, load tests)
execution_layers.parallelization_note: All 4 test generators are independent and can run simultaneously

execution_layers.description: Compile all test cases into structured test suite
Generate executable test code and documentation in parallel
execution_layers.parallelization_note: Code generation and documentation generation are independent

execution_plan.critical_path_diagram: step_1 -> step_2 -> [step_3, step_4, step_5, step_6 in parallel] -> step_7 -> [step_8, step_9 in parallel]

data_flow_summary.step_2_to_steps_3_6: endpoint_registry, parameter_matrix, auth_matrix, dependency_graph (distributed to 4 parallel generators)
data_flow_summary.steps_3_6_to_step_7: happy_path_tests, edge_case_tests, error_path_tests, security_tests, load_test_scenarios (collected by compiler)
data_flow_summary.step_7_to_steps_8_9: test_suite, test_execution_plan (distributed to code generator and documentation generator)

execution_recommendations.recommended_order: Execute layers sequentially (1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5) to respect dependencies
execution_recommendations.parallelization_opportunity: Layer 3 can execute all 4 test generators in parallel, reducing execution time from 720 seconds (sequential) to 180 seconds (parallel)
execution_recommendations.resource_requirements: Moderate CPU and memory; no external API calls required (specification is local input)
execution_recommendations.error_recovery: If any step in layer 3 fails, the entire chain fails. Recommend running steps individually first to validate inputs.
execution_recommendations.optimization_notes: Layer 3 is the bottleneck. Optimize test generators for performance if specification is very large (>100 endpoints).

missing_skills.description: Parses OpenAPI 3.0 or Swagger 2.0 specifications (JSON/YAML) and validates against schema. Returns parsed specification, validation errors, and metadata (endpoint count, parameter count, security schemes).

Extracts endpoint metadata (path, method, parameters, responses, authentication) from validated OpenAPI specification. Detects data dependencies between endpoints (e.g., POST returns ID, GET requires ID). Returns endpoint registry, parameter matrix, authentication matrix, and dependency graph.
missing_skills.domain: API metadata extraction and dependency detection

missing_skills.description: Generates valid test cases for all endpoints using example values from specification or realistic defaults. Orders tests by dependency graph so dependent tests run after their dependencies. Returns happy-path test cases and ordered test sequence.

Generates boundary and combination test cases for all parameters. Tests numeric boundaries (min, max, zero, negative), string boundaries (empty, max length, special characters, unicode), array boundaries (empty, single element, max size), date/time boundaries (epoch, far future, timezone), and optional parameter combinations. Limits to 3-5 edge cases per parameter. Returns edge-case test cases and parameter coverage matrix.

Generates error-path tests for all documented error codes (400, 401, 403, 404, 409, 429) and security tests for OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities (SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, broken authentication, sensitive data exposure, insecure deserialization, rate limiting). Returns error-path test cases, security test cases, and coverage matrices.

Generates load test scenarios (concurrent requests, high-volume data, sustained load) with performance assertions (p50, p95, p99 response times, error rate < 1%). Uses performance_sla_ms to set thresholds. Returns load test scenarios and performance assertions.

Organizes all test cases (happy path, edge cases, error paths, security tests, load tests) into a structured test suite. Orders tests by dependency graph and phase. Assigns unique test IDs. Returns compiled test suite object and test execution plan.

Generates syntactically valid, executable test code in specified framework (pytest, jest, mocha, postman, or generic). Includes setup/teardown, assertions, error handling, and execution plan. Splits into multiple files if code exceeds 500 lines. Returns executable test code and framework-specific test files.
missing_skills.domain: Test code generation for multiple frameworks

missing_skills.description: Generates test plan document (overview, test case matrix, coverage summary, execution order), coverage report (endpoint %, parameter %, error code %, security %), and execution guide (prerequisites, how to run, how to interpret results, how to add new tests). Returns test documentation, coverage report, and execution guide.
